creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2011-12-13 16:26:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    graphics/showimage   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    graphics/showimage/files patch-CMakeLists.txt 
                             patch-showimage.desktop 
  Log:
  Add new port graphics/showimage:
  
  ShowImage is a simple KDE based image viewer using the maximum space
  inside its window without cluttering the window with menubar, toolbar
  or statusbar.
  
  WWW:    http://kde-apps.org/content/show.php/ShowImage?content=143977
  
  PR:             based on ports/162900
  Submitted by:   Rusty Nejdl <rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/graphics/showimage/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/graphics/showimage/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/graphics/showimage/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/graphics/showimage/files/patch-showimage.desktop (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/graphics/showimage/pkg-descr (new)
